titleStmt.title: SII 18.153: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 153. (B.K. No. 142 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 1[2]th regnal year of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva, Śukḷa, [Pushya, Monday], Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The tithi is lost. In the month of Pushya of the cyclic year cited, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on Sunday, December 25, A.D. 1149. This probably was the intended date.

It records a grant of land to the god Nīlakanṭhēśa by Hollimarasa and Kopparāja, the Ūroḍeya and Mahāprabhu respectively of Herakal. The deity is stated to have been installed by Nilakaṇṭha-Paṇḍita, at Herakal. Mention is made of a certain Mahāmaṇḍlēśvara (name lost), the governor of Kisukāḍu Seventy, Bāgaḍage Seventy, Keḷavāḍi Three-hundred and Nareyaṅgal Twelve.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .These lines are engraved on the left side of the present record. Below these are also the following lines:
śrīnīlakaṁṭhadēvara Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ Aca kaṁ biṭṭa
hadināṟu Adakke sīme teṁka
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ ma ja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaranabhinava
saru kisukāḍerppattumaṁ bāgaḍageyerppattumaṁ keḷavāḍi mūnūṟumaṁ nareyaṁgallu hanneraḍumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadinda sukha
vṛtta . toṟegalināḍa caṭṭa keḷavāḍiya ḷabāciyaṁ neṟavanape rttu kaḷedantavarirvvara nāḍugoṇḍu hēraṟikeya cakravartti besa
tūḷdiṟideṟeya biḍidaṁ kali hermmabhūbhujaṁ . tatpāda padmōpajīvi . vṛtta . paramaparōpakāraguṇadiṁduditōditapuṇyadiṁ sa
tadiṁ śivabhaktiyiṁ prajādharaṇadineyde hollimarasaṁ herakalloḷaśēṣabhōgadiṁ sthiraneni sirddanūroḍeyavṛttige santōsadiṁ nirantaraṁ . guṇa
dayānvitaneṁdu śiṣṭapōśaṇayutaneṁdu saucayutaneṁdu virōdhivimarddanaykakāraṇa yutaneṁdu rūpayutaneṁdu jagajjanaveyde baṇniku
herakalla mahāprabhu kopparājanaṁ . Antenisideraḍuṁ baḷadūroḍeyarirvvaruṁ sukhadiṁ prabhutvamaṁ māḍuttire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāya
mōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasampannaruṁ bhujaṁga kuḷatiḷakarumappa śrīmadrājadhāni bāgaḍageya kōṭeya śrī mūlaparuṣe
nīlakaṇṭhapaṇḍitadēvaru . vṛtta . Idu rāmāyatavṛttiyintidu diṭaṁ śrīrāma tīrtthanilayaṁ biditaṁ puṇyanadītaṭaṁ sakalapuṇyō
herakalloḷeṁdā munipaṁ śrīnīlakaṇṭhaṁ manōmudadiṁ māḍisi supratiṣṭhevaḍedaṁ śrīnīlakaṇṭhēśanaṁ . Antenisida śrīnīla
raṁ śrīnīlakaṇṭhapaṇḍitadēvaru pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi pūjāviśēṣamaṁ mārppudaṁ kaṇḍu hollimarasanuṁ kopparasanuṁ . Antā
rūroḍeyarumirddu . svasti śrīmaccāḷukya pratāpacakravartti jagadē kamallavarṣada 12neya śuklasaṁvatsarada pu
mavāradaṁdinuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiparvva nimittamāgi śrīnīlakaṇṭhadēvara Aṁga bhōgakkaṁ yara grāsakkaṁ śrīnīlakaṇṭhapaṇḍita
laṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi mānyada kōlalu biṭṭa mattaru Irppattanālku [I]dakke Aṟuvaṇa sēse yintī U
. Adarkke sīme śrīsiddhēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ baḍagalu . mu ḷikōḍa baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu . baḍagalu sīme holavēre
haḍuvaṇa sīme bhaḷāriya keyi . Ā dēvarige mane śrīrāmēśvaradēvara kēriyiṁ tenkalu mūḍa lāgi Irppa
nālvatteṁṭu kayya nīḷa . Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁge gaṁgāsāgara prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra rtthameṁbī puṇya
kavilegaḷa kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷaṁ kaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dakṣiṇe
Idanaḷida vā puṇya nitu kavilegaḷaṁ Anitu brāhmaṇarumaṁ dibya
pātaka About two more
Digital edition of SII 18.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
